_meta.author: easemize
_meta.title: Hover Glow Button
_meta.description: a dynamic React component that adds an engaging, mouse-following glow effect to your buttons. Part of the EaseMize UI library, it's designed for both ease of use and deep customization. Configure the glowColor, backgroundColor, textColor, and hoverTextColor props to create the perfect interactive element for your application. The smooth animation enhances user experience, making clicks more inviting.
